records.question: Which events at Marathon on 13 October 2008 with an attendance of at least 6650 were covered by journalists who have exactly 3 years of experience and wrote Screening reports?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT event.event_id FROM event
JOIN news_report ON event.event_id = news_report.event_id
JOIN journalist ON news_report.journalist_id = journalist.journalist_id
WHERE journalist.years_working = 3 AND event.date = '13 October 2008' AND event.venue = 'Marathon' AND event.event_attendance >= 6650 AND news_report.work_type = 'Screening'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT event.Event_ID 
FROM event 
JOIN news_report ON event.Event_ID = news_report.Event_ID 
JOIN journalist ON news_report.journalist_ID = journalist.journalist_ID 
WHERE event.Venue = 'Marathon' 
AND event.Date = '2008-10-13' 
AND event.Event_Attendance >= 6650 
AND journalist.Years_working = 3 
AND news_report.Work_Type = 'Screening'

records.question: Which events on 11 October 2007 had at most 369 attendees and were associated with news reports where the work_type is Music?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT event.event_id FROM event
JOIN news_report ON event.event_id = news_report.event_id
WHERE news_report.work_type = 'Music' AND event.event_attendance <= 369 AND event.date = '11 October 2007'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT event.Event_ID 
FROM event 
JOIN news_report ON event.Event_ID = news_report.Event_ID 
WHERE event.Date = '2007-10-11' 
AND event.Event_Attendance <= 369 
AND news_report.Work_Type = 'Music'

records.question: Which Government Hearing events on 11 October 2007 had at most 369 attendees and were covered by Jackie Waring, a journalist with at most 21 years working, writing music reports?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT event.event_id FROM event
JOIN news_report ON event.event_id = news_report.event_id
JOIN journalist ON news_report.journalist_id = journalist.journalist_id
WHERE event.event_attendance <= 369 AND event.name = 'Government Hearing' AND event.date = '11 October 2007' AND journalist.years_working <= 21 AND news_report.work_type = 'Music' AND journalist.name = 'Jackie Waring'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT event.Event_ID 
FROM event 
JOIN news_report ON event.Event_ID = news_report.Event_ID 
JOIN journalist ON news_report.journalist_ID = journalist.journalist_ID 
WHERE event.Date = '2007-10-11' 
AND event.Venue = 'Government Hearing' 
AND event.Event_Attendance <= 369 
AND journalist.Name = 'Jackie Waring' 
AND journalist.Years_working <= 21 
AND news_report.Work_Type = 'music'
